filter: For each preset, every fitted planet must have at least one continuous-sweep phase angle (0–360°, step 0.5°) satisfying both Laplace-Lagrange bounds and JPL ecliptic-inclination trend direction. Phase angles are independent per planet (no shared balanced-year anchor required).

format_per_preset.config: per-planet { d: Fibonacci quantum, antiPhase: boolean }
format_per_preset.best_phases: per-planet { phase_deg, mean_deg, amp_deg, trend_deg_per_cy, err_arcsec_per_cy, range_min_deg, range_max_deg } at the LL+dir-feasible phase angle minimizing |trend − JPL|
format_per_preset.total_trend_err_arcsec: sum of best per-planet |trend − JPL| in arcsec/century
